2.label: On/Off (1)
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off with the first button (uses Basic command class).

3.label: Dimmer (1)
3.description: Devices in this group will change their level according to the operation of the first button (uses Multilevel Switch command class).

4.label: On/Off (2)
4.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off with the second button (uses Basic command class).

5.label: Dimmer (2)
5.description: Devices in this group will change their level according to the operation of the second button (uses Multilevel Switch command class).

6.label: Multidevice
6.description: Devices in this group will be controlled with the buttons. Intended for controlling different types of devices.

7.label: Slats
7.description: Devices in this group will have their slats moved with the buttons. Intended for Venetian blinds.

paramInformation.label: Operation Mode
paramInformation.description: Choose the mode depending on the type of the device you want to control remotely

paramInformation.label: LED Ring: First Button Color
paramInformation.description: Color of the first button indicator (upper part of the LED ring) for indications using Indicator CC

paramInformation.label: LED Ring: Second Button Color
paramInformation.description: Color of the second button indicator (lower part of the LED ring) for indications using Indicator CC

paramInformation.label: First Button: Double Click Value
paramInformation.description: Value of Basic Set or Multilevel Set frame (depending on selected mode) sent to associated devices after double click. Not relevant for Scene Controller Mode.

paramInformation.label: Second Button: Double Click Value
paramInformation.description: Value of Basic Set or Multilevel Set frame (depending on selected mode) sent to associated devices after double click. Used only in Double Button Mode.

metadata.inclusion: Quickly click one of the buttons three times. The LED starts blinking yellow.
metadata.exclusion:
1. Quickly click one of the buttons three times, then press and hold it for 12 seconds.
2. Release the button when the device glows green.
3. Quickly click the button to confirm. The LED starts blinking yellow.
metadata.reset:
1. Quickly click one of the buttons three times, then press and hold it for 21 seconds.
2. Release the button when the device glows yellow.
3. Quickly click the button to confirm.
4. After a few seconds the device restarts, which is signaled with the red LED color.
metadata.wakeup:
1. Quickly click one of the buttons three times, then press and hold it.
2. Release the button when the device signals the first menu position with white color.
3. Quickly click the button to confirm.
